title: Enge En Idhayam (Unnai Kandaene) lyrics Kandaen songs lyrics
stanzas:
Singers: Dr Burn, Krish, Prashanthini
Lyrics :Thamarai
Movie: Kandaen
Song ;Enge En Idhayam (Kandaene)

Unnai Kandaene, Ennai Thandhaene
Sorchuvaiye pon silaye
Va baby baby
Ullunarve,  mai-viliye
Poisonnalum en kadhal unmai
Therve

En sevikalil kavidhaiyai pola
Ennul sendrai pudhu unarvagulaga
En nandhavana pookalai pola
Thinam malarkindrai, viral theendavendum
Varam vendum tharuvaaya

Enge, En Idhayam engae,
Enge, nan thaedi parpen
Anbe, nee kondu sendrai, Niyayam thana

Ingae, un idhayam vandhu,
Ninre, en kadhavai thatti
Konde, nirpathai kandaen unnamaithana

Thozhai thoora velichangal neeye
Malaiyora velichamum neeye
Anbil, sandhegam, kolaadhey
Kondal, en jeeevan, niladhey

Imaipozhudhu un nenjil irundhu
Nani kadhavena vendum, Tharuvaya,tharuvaya

En anbe anbe enai vinai pidikum 
Thiranum aatralum unnaiye sardhadhu,
Unnarvaya, unnarvaya
En anbe anbe ..

Karirulil suriyan, meralayil thamarai
Padhathil megam, pali mannil vaanmazhai
vayasaithu parkiren, Vaarthai-galil un mozhi
Un-naavil vandhu, theertham-agum thaen-thuli
Kedigaram kattuma, manam sellum vegathai
Puyalagi unnai nan adaiven
Nee sellum vazhi ellam maram aaven
Oru sottu veyil kooda vida mataen

Enge, En Idhayam engae,
Enge, nan thaedi parpen
Anbe, nee kondu sendrai
Niyayam thana ..unnai kandaene ..

Ingae, un idhayam vandhu, 
Ninre, en kadhavai thatti
Konde, nirpathai kandaen unnamaithana

Unnai Kandaene, Ennai Thandhaene
Sorchuvaiye pon silaye
Va baby baby

Ullunarve,  mai-viliye
Poisonnalum en kadhal unmai
Therve

Katril varam vanginenen,
moongil-vali neenginen
sangeetha-maga, unnaithane padinen

Kathirindha natkalil,
Kadhal oru aaruthal
Kaanamal sendru pinbu thonrum vaanavil

Pilai serndha podhilum, kurai nindra podhilum
Unnakaga-than, adhai seithen
Ini ennai, piriyadhe, oru naalum
Pirindhal, en uyire un sumai-aagum

Anbe, nee kondu sendrai

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic relationships.

What is the plot context of the movie Kandaen?

Kandaen revolves around themes of love and relationships, making this song a perfect fit for its narrative.

Who are the singers of Enge En Idhayam?

The song features the talented voices of Dr Burn, Krish, and Prashanthini.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Enge En Idhayam was composed by Vijay Ebenezer.

When was the song released?

The song was released on December 12, 2010.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Kandaen, the song Enge En Idhayam serves as a poignant expression of love and yearning. The lyrics, crafted by Thamarai, evoke a sense of nostalgia and deep emotional connection between the characters. The harmonious blend of voices from Dr Burn, Krish, and Prashanthini enhances the romantic vibe, making it a perfect backdrop for intimate moments. This melody resonates with anyone who has experienced the highs and lows of love, leaving a lasting impression.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Enge En Idhayam from Kandaen is a mesmerizing romantic duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the unique collaboration of Dr Burn, Krish, and Prashanthini, this song enchants listeners with its heartfelt lyrics penned by Thamarai and the soulful composition by Vijay Ebenezer. Dive into the emotional depths of this track that resonates with anyone who has ever experienced love.
stanzaMeanings: I have seen you, you have given me. The words are like a precious gem. Oh baby baby, your feelings, like a sharp arrow, even poison cannot match my love's truth.
Like poetry in my heart, new feelings arise within me. Like the flowers in my garden, they bloom every day, and I must reach out to them. Will you grant me a boon?
Where is my heart, where is it? I will search for it. My love, you have sent me a message, is it fair?
Here, your heart has come, and it has taken my path. I have seen your true self.
You are the light that shines in the darkness. You are the light of the night. In love, do not doubt. My life is steady because of you.
In this moment, I need to receive a gift from your heart. Will you give it to me?
My love, my love, you capture my fate. Your wisdom and grace are all I need. You are my truth, my truth.
My love, my love...

In the darkness, the sun shines, and the lotus blooms. In the path, clouds gather, and I see the rain in the world. In words, your language comes to me, it becomes a sweet nectar. Will my heart build a home, will it express its speed? I will not leave you even in the scorching sun.
Where is my heart, where is it? I will search for it. My love, you have sent me a message, is it fair?
Here, your heart has come, and it has taken my path. I have seen your true self.
I have seen you, you have given me. The words are like a precious gem. Oh baby baby.
Your feelings, like a sharp arrow, even poison cannot match my love's truth.
I have received a boon in the wind, I have crossed the path of the moon, oh music, I have sung for you.
In the days of waiting, love is a longing. After not seeing, it will appear in the sky.
Even in the moments of joy or sorrow, I did it for you. Now, do not separate me, even for a day. If we part, my life will become your shadow.
Where is my heart, where is it? I will search for it. My love, you have sent me a message, is it fair?
Here, your heart has come, and it has taken my path. I have seen your true self.
You are the light that shines in the darkness. You are the light of the night. In love, do not doubt. My life is steady because of you.
I have seen you, you have given me. The words are like a precious gem. Oh baby baby, your feelings, like a sharp arrow, even poison cannot match my love's truth.
Like poetry in my heart, new feelings arise within me. Like the flowers in my garden, they bloom every day, and I must reach out to them. Will you grant me a boon?
